context: Agent applies the MoSCoW categorization workflow to a 10-item requirement list with rationale and constraint validation.

checklist.name: Release constraints confirmed
checklist.description: moscow-table.md explicitly states the 6-week deadline, 3-engineer team, and no-extension constraint before the categorization table.

checklist.name: All 10 requirements categorized
checklist.description: Every requirement (1-10) appears in the table with a Must/Should/Could/Won't category assigned.

checklist.name: Rationale column populated
checklist.description: Every row has a non-empty business rationale and risk-if-omitted entry (not just blanks or 'N/A').

checklist.name: Explicit Won't with revisit date
checklist.description: At least one requirement is categorized as Won't and includes an explicit revisit date.

checklist.name: Preference-only items not in Must
checklist.description: Items that are clearly preference-based (dark mode, PayPal, multi-currency) are NOT in the Must tier.
